title: macropanax delavayi
intro: Macropanax delavayi, also known as the Tibetan knotweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer effects. The health benefits of Macropanax delavayi include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially helping to prevent or treat certain types of cancer. Macropanax delavayi is often prepared as a herbal tea or supplement, and its extracts have been studied for their potential therapeutic applications.
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong xi yi jie he za zhi Zhongguo Zhongxiyi jiehe zazhi = Chinese journal of integrated traditional and Western medicine", macropanax delavayi benefits include the potential to improve phagocytic function of macrophage, as indicated by the granule's ability to enhance carbon clearance in animal experiments.
